plan_adherence_notes: All 7 plan steps were addressed. Steps 1, 2, 4, 5, 6, 7 followed exactly. Step 3 was partially followed: only Portfolio.test.tsx was refactored to use createMockQueryResult; MarketDetail, DiscussionThread, and ConditionalEditor were intentionally skipped because they use 'as unknown as' casts and had no actual build errors. This was a reasonable pragmatic deviation — the plan over-scoped the consolidation. The shared helpers (createMockQueryResult, createMockMutationResult) were still created for future use. Build passes clean, all 410 tests pass.
missed_questions: Could the plan have been simpler by only fixing the 4 actual errors rather than also consolidating mock helpers across files that had no build errors?
reason: All TypeScript build errors are resolved: (1) Portfolio.test.tsx missing UseQueryResult properties fixed via shared createMockQueryResult helper, (2) ProbabilityBar.test.tsx array access errors fixed with non-null assertions matching codebase convention, (3) api-client.test.ts array access errors fixed with non-null assertions, (4) chartUtils.test.ts process.env type error fixed via minimal test-globals.d.ts declaration. Build passes clean (tsc + vite), all 410 tests pass across 32 files. The changes are minimal, targeted, and follow established codebase patterns.
